name: King Chimp
description: A hyper-realistic chimpanzee with a punk-rock royalty aesthetic.

visual_anchors.face_dna: Realistic Chimpanzee (Planet of the Apes style) + The Notorious B.I.G. (Crown/Swagger)
visual_anchors.face: Chimpanzee face, mischievous toothy grin, gold paper-texture crown, retro 3D anaglyph glasses (red/blue lenses), septum piercing, earring
visual_anchors.body: Anthropomorphic chimpanzee body, dark fur, standing posture
visual_anchors.attire: Black leather biker jacket (silver spikes on shoulders, flower embroidery), white ribbed tank top, navy blue tailored shorts, white socks, black canvas high-top sneakers
visual_anchors.skin_texture: High-fidelity fur texture, realistic animal skin details

notes: Draft for user verification. Please confirm details.
